gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps forward, smiles brightly, and gestures toward the grouped colorful objects on the screen with both hands
a tutor tilts the head slightly, raises both arms in an inviting gesture, and leans forward as if encouraging guesses
a tutor moves sideways, reaches out with one hand, and mimics arranging objects in rows while describing the array
a tutor stands tall, spreads arms wide, and slowly gestures as if revealing how the array relates to addition
a tutor crouches slightly, points thoughtfully at the groups, and encourages the class to count together with enthusiasm
a tutor nods encouragingly while waving a hand as if inviting students to write down their thoughts on the multiplication fact
a person claps hands joyfully, steps back, and smiles broadly while celebrating the students' understanding of multiplication
a tutor gently gestures with both hands to reinforce the concept, as if connecting repeated addition to the idea of multiplication
